Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /
Allow: /images/

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /
Allow: /images/

User-agent: Pinterest
Allow: /
Allow: /images/

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
